title: Tokyo Grand van Gogh Exhibition
description: Experience the Grand van Gogh Exhibition in Tokyo - an immersive journey through the life and masterworks of Vincent van Gogh. A must-see event for art lovers visiting Japan.

title: Yokohama Belgian Beer Weekend 2026
description: Enjoy the Belgian Beer Weekend festival in Yokohama - one of Japan's most popular international beer events featuring hundreds of Belgian beers, food stalls, and live entertainment.

title: Osaka Belgian Beer Weekend 2026
description: Celebrate the Belgian Beer Weekend in Osaka - a fantastic outdoor festival featuring authentic Belgian beers, delicious food, and a lively atmosphere in the heart of Japan's kitchen city.
